name: Datacenter UPS Battery System Reporting
description: Create a new facility named "Peak Data Center" (use 100 Server Way, Ashburn, VA 20147 for the address) in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Then, add a new chemical entry for Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9). Mark it as an EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance) and select the Physical State as 'Liquid'. For Physical Hazards, select 'Corrosive to metal'. For Health Hazards, select 'Skin corrosion or irritation' and 'Serious eye damage or eye irritation'. In the inventory section, report using EXACT AMOUNTS (do not use range codes). Set the Maximum Daily Amount to 2500, Average Daily Amount to 2500, and Number of Days On-Site to 365. Finally, add a Storage Location with Container Type 'Battery', Pressure 'Ambient pressure', Temperature 'Ambient temperature', and Location Description 'UPS Room B'. Save the submission file to EXACTLY: C:\Tier2Submit\Data\peak_datacenter_ups.t2s (create the directory if it doesn't exist).
